text.title: Graph RAG Indexing Pipeline Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: ingest-and-chunk
step.action: Chunk every doc with deterministic chunk_id = sha1(doc_id + idx + content_hash)[:16].

step.name: extract-entities
step.action: LLM-extract (entity, type, mentions) per chunk with extraction_model=cheap.

step.name: canonicalize-entities
step.action: Case fold + alias table + embedding-sim dedup at cosine ≥ 0.92.
step.decision-gate: If canonical count > 5x distinct mentions, raise threshold to 0.95 and re-run.

step.name: build-graph
step.action: Build nodes + weighted edges (co-occurrence within chunk_window).

step.name: detect-communities
step.action: Run Leiden clustering at multiple resolutions; assign community_id.

step.name: summarize-communities
step.action: LLM-summarize each community with summary_model; cache by member_set_hash.
step.decision-gate: If community has 1 member, skip summary.

step.name: checkpoint-and-version
step.action: Write checkpoint manifest matching schema; bump version; pass to validator.
